underlying_goal: Debug and fix Kubernetes health probe failures and address a series of resiliency/compliance audit findings for their recommendations-service
friction_detail: The initial fix to main.ts was reverted/not persisted, causing the user to report the same probe failure again after deploying.
brief_summary: User needed to debug failed Kubernetes probes and systematically address resiliency audit findings; Claude diagnosed the Fastify binding issue, fixed probes/healthchecks/tags, and correctly triaged items that couldn't or didn't need fixing.
